# Hospital Analytics Dashboard

## Project Overview

This project presents an interactive Hospital Analytics Dashboard developed using Power BI to analyze and visualize healthcare data. The dashboard provides insights into patient admissions, revenue performance, satisfaction scores, length of stay, and departmental performance.

## Objectives

* Monitor hospital operational performance.
* Analyze patient distribution across departments.
* Track revenue generated by different departments.
* Evaluate patient satisfaction and average length of stay.
* Provide interactive filtering for better decision-making.

## Tools Used

* Power BI
* Microsoft Excel
* DAX (Data Analysis Expressions)

## Key Features

* KPI Cards for Total Patients, Total Revenue, Satisfaction Score, and Average Length of Stay.
* Department-wise Patient Analysis.
* Revenue by Department Visualization.
* Gender Distribution Analysis.
* Admission Type Analysis.
* Monthly Revenue Trend Monitoring.
* Interactive Filters for Department, Gender, and City.

## Dataset Information

* Total Records: 12,000 Patients
* Data Fields:

  * Patient ID
  * Age
  * Gender
  * City
  * Department
  * Admission Date
  * Length of Stay
  * Admission Type
  * Doctor Name
  * Total Bill
  * Insurance Status
  * Satisfaction Score
  * Outcome

## Dashboard Insights

* Identifies departments with the highest patient volume.
* Tracks revenue contribution across departments.
* Monitors patient demographics and admission patterns.
* Evaluates healthcare service performance through satisfaction metrics.

## Project Outcome

The dashboard enables healthcare administrators to make data-driven decisions by providing a comprehensive view of hospital operations and patient-related metrics.
